_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the output-too-large scenario (job-output-too-large playbook). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get (Info: could not retrieve result / message too large; OutputArguments empty) -> jobs logs (workflow completed, then handback failed on Out_AllInvoices DataTable) -> jobs traces (all activities Succeeded) and reads process/project.json + entry-points.json for the DataTable output argument. Keys are stable.
